world_summary: A bounded harbor-risk world where documentary evidence, delayed warnings, and evacuation timing compete under storm pressure.

world_summary_i18n.zh-CN: 一个受约束的港口风险世界：文书证据、延迟预警和疏散时机在风暴压力下相互竞争。

baseline_description: The baseline assumes the copied ledger can reach the decision loop on time and the warning chain remains open long enough for an evacuation call.

baseline_description_i18n.zh-CN: 基线假设账本副本能及时进入决策链，预警链也保持畅通，从而足以触发疏散决定。

perturbation_options.title: Delay the ledger courier
perturbation_options.description: Delay the copied ledger before it reaches the public decision loop.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 在账本副本进入公开决策链之前，将它的传递时机往后拖。

perturbation_options.summary: Delay the copied ledger before it reaches the public decision loop.

summary_i18n.zh-CN: 让账本副本晚一点进入公开决策链。

perturbation_options.title: Block the deputy-mayor escalation path
perturbation_options.description: Block the first direct escalation path while keeping the ledger on schedule.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 阻断第一条直接升级路径，同时不改变账本公开节奏。

perturbation_options.summary: Block the direct escalation path while keeping the ledger on schedule.

summary_i18n.zh-CN: 阻断直接升级路径，但账本依然按原节奏公开。

perturbation_options.title: Degrade the harbor warning relay
perturbation_options.description: Delay the harbor warning and the first chance to surface the ledger.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 让港口预警延后，同时推迟账本第一次被公开的机会。

perturbation_options.summary: Delay the harbor warning and the first chance to surface the ledger.

summary_i18n.zh-CN: 让港口预警和账本公开的第一机会一起延后。
